identity.name: LDW.build
identity.personalDeclaration: Anything, Everything, or Nothing at All.

bannedVocabulary: God showed me in a dream
signatureLines: To be early is to be on time. To be on time is to be late. To be late is unacceptable.
I'd rather be an excellent #2 than an average #1.
Three things I don't play with: my wife, my kids, my money, and God's house.
We don't leave our brain at home, but we don't leave our business degree in the car either.
Anything, everything, or nothing at all.

copper.role: Accent — dividers, labels, metadata, logo working face

signal.notes: Used sparingly — once per layout max.

offWhite.role: Breathing — light backgrounds, text on dark

rules: Display font is ALWAYS ALL CAPS. Never mixed case.
Maximum two typefaces in a layout (mono as metadata is a third, separate role).
Monospace carries outsized weight — dates, project codes, metadata, labels.

logoMarks.name: The Cornerstone
logoMarks.description: Isometric cornerstone, two planes meeting at a central ridge

logoMarks.name: The Shift
logoMarks.description: Two horizontal bars, stacked but offset

contentPillars.name: WORD
contentPillars.focus: Biblical wisdom applied to building and leadership

forbiddenCrossovers: Never use 2819 brand assets (logos, colors, fonts, visual patterns).
Never convert LDW.build into a church platform.
Never promote church services or events as LDW.build content.
Never dilute the Builder. Operator. Author. positioning.
Never use ministry-insider language for a general audience.
validationCheck: Does this speak as Lonnell Williams, not as the church?
Does it reinforce the Builder / Operator / Author positioning?
Does it use LDW.build color palette and typography?
Does it end with a challenge or a CTA?
Does it avoid every item in FORBIDDEN CROSSOVERS?
Does it avoid every banned vocabulary word?
Would at least 2 of the 3 audiences see themselves in it?
